title: bitwarden: zeroization gap undocumented (SDK plain String)
description: Trigger: any live get() call. secret_resp.value is a String from the bitwarden SDK — not Zeroizing. Secret bytes persist in unzeroed heap from deserialization until allocator reclaims. vault and gcp-sm document this class of gap in a module-level # Zeroization section; bitwarden has none. A user comparing backends will see no warning and assume full zeroization. Fix: add # Zeroization section to module doc noting the SDK gap in get().
